CHANGELOG
=========

crostini-setup-duet5.sh — Crostini post-install bootstrap
Lenovo IdeaPad Duet 5 Chromebook (82QS0001US / 13Q7C6)


2.8.0  2026-03-15

  * default to fully unattended execution (zero interactive prompts)
  * add --interactive flag to restore original prompt behavior
  * add --git-name=, --git-email=, --ssh-comment= flags
  * wrap step 2 + step 18 interactive blocks (open_chromeos_url, sleep,
    read, instruction printf) inside if ! $UNATTENDED guards
  * SSH key auto-generated with no passphrase in unattended mode
  * update help text, banners, README for --interactive semantics

2.7.1  2026-03-15

  * move DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive before step blocks (persist on
    checkpoint resume)
  * cosmetic: strip trailing whitespace, normalize blank lines

2.7.0  2026-03-15

  * call ssh-keygen directly to avoid logging passphrase via run()
  * initialize LOG_FILE with chmod 600 before first write
  * add PID-based stale lock detection (auto-remove dead locks)
  * apply tee pattern to run_shell() (show rustup/NodeSource progress)
  * use sudo mktemp in write_file_sudo() for atomic writes
  * clean up variables at end of steps 1, 2, 13, 17, 19

2.6.0  2026-03-15

  * add SSH passphrase prompt (remove hardcoded -N "")
  * guard 6 git config keys with existing-value checks
  * conditionalize inotify sysctl success/fail log
  * replace all 18 'sudo apt' with 'sudo apt-get'
  * export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive around apt steps
  * make write_file() and write_file_sudo() atomic (tmpfile + mv)
  * add apt-get full-upgrade in step 3
  * hoist check_tool()/check_config() to helpers section
  * tee run() output to terminal and log (fix silent-freeze UX)
  * move NODE_MAJOR, SYSCTL_CONF to constants block
  * rename SND_DEVICES -> SND_DEV_COUNT for consistency

2.5.10  2026-03-15

  * guard code --version pipe against SIGPIPE under pipefail

2.5.9  2026-03-15

  * guard check_tool() --version pipe against SIGPIPE
  * sync all 19 step descriptions across help, banners, README

2.5.8  2026-03-15

  * remove all box-drawing decorative characters
  * remove unused CYAN color variable

2.5.7  2026-03-15

  * trim multiline comments to single lines
  * strip decorative line art from section headers
  * inline GTK3_DIR and GTK4_DIR (used once each)

2.5.6  2026-03-15

  * fix step 8 comment: add GTK2 and cursor to listed layers
  * fix GPU comment: Crostini has X11 via sommelier XWayland
  * add || true guard to xdg-user-dirs-update

2.5.5  2026-03-15

  * add || true to rmdir in cleanup() trap (fix exit code corruption)
  * add || true to VS Code curl download (graceful fallback)
  * restructure VS Code dpkg/apt-fix chain as if/else

2.5.4  2026-03-15

  * add || warn to git lfs install
  * add || true to SSH pubkey tee

2.5.3  2026-03-15

  * fix check_tool "glmark2" -> "glmark2-es2-wayland"
  * validate checkpoint file content is numeric

2.5.2  2026-03-15

  * add || die guards to write_file()/write_file_sudo()
  * replace deprecated VS Code Ozone flags with --ozone-platform-hint=auto
  * add -s check on NodeSource GPG keyring after curl|gpg
  * remove glmark2 GLX variant (Crostini is Wayland-only)

2.5.1  2026-03-14

  * wrap VS Code download in DRY_RUN guard
  * replace fragile find -not -name with -mindepth 1
  * add -u (nounset) to run_shell() subshell

2.5.0  2026-03-13

  * guard all step 2/13/17/18 interactive prompts with DRY_RUN
  * replace hardcoded vscode temp path with mktemp
  * add error handling to all unguarded sudo calls

2.4.1  2026-03-09

  * add existence guards to 5 write_file calls (prevent overwrite)
  * make NODE_MAJOR and SYSCTL_CONF readonly
  * replace ls|wc with find for /dev/snd count (SC2012)
  * wrap preflight curl in DRY_RUN guard

2.4.0  2026-03-08

  * add mkdir-based lock file for concurrent-run safety
  * replace hardcoded /tmp/vscode-arm64.deb with mktemp
  * fix set_checkpoint() writing during --dry-run
  * route all remaining dry-run bypasses through run()
  * fix --dry-run crash in step 17 (chmod on non-existent key)

2.3.1  2026-03-08

  * route per-package apt loops through run() for dry-run/logging
  * add vm.swappiness writability check (read-only in Crostini)
  * show virgl Vulkan status in summary

2.3.0  2026-03-08

  * remove pulseaudio daemon (conflicts with Crostini host audio)
  * remove standalone xwayland (conflicts with sommelier)
  * fix OLED font rendering: rgba=none (no LCD subpixel stripe)
  * replace ping with curl for network check (ICMP blocked)
  * add --yes to gpg --dearmor for idempotent re-runs
  * remove transitional apt-transport-https

2.2.0  2026-03-08

  * remove Fish shell step (Crostini default is bash)
  * renumber steps 18-20 -> 17-19

2.1.1  2026-03-08

  * add vm.swappiness=10 and dirty ratio tuning for 4 GB device
  * add memory config to summary verification

2.1.0  2026-03-08

  * eliminate all eval usage: run() passes "$@" directly
  * add run_shell(), write_file(), write_file_sudo() helpers
  * replace hardcoded UID 1000 with $(id -u)
  * pipefail-safe logging (no pipe in log path)
  * add trap handler for EXIT/INT/TERM

2.0.0  2026-03-08

  * full rewrite: 19-step automated setup
  * auto-open ChromeOS settings via garcon-url-handler
  * GPU + graphics stack (Mesa, Virgl, Wayland, Vulkan)
  * audio stack (ALSA, PulseAudio, GStreamer)
  * display scaling tuned for 13.3" FHD OLED
  * GUI apps with MIME defaults, fonts, screenshots
  * VS Code Wayland/Ozone flags
  * summary: GPU, Vulkan, Wayland, audio, configs, tools

1.1.0  2026-03-08

  * add GPU detection and verification
  * add GPU/Wayland/audio/shared folder status to summary

1.0.0  2026-03-08

  * initial release: Crostini bootstrap with checkpoint resume,
    --dry-run, colored output, and full logging
